requirement_topic.en: Ecodesign Requirements — Space Heaters and ISDE Subsidy Performance Thresholds (Netherlands)
requirement_topic.zh: 生态设计要求——空间供暖设备与ISDE补贴性能门槛（荷兰）
requirement_topic.zht: 生態設計要求——空間供暖設備與ISDE補貼性能門檻（荷蘭）

summary.en: Ecodesign Regulation (EU) 813/2013 (implementing Directive 2009/125/EC) sets minimum seasonal space heating energy efficiency (ηs) thresholds for space heaters, expressed for heat pumps as SCOP (seasonal coefficient of performance). Testing at rated conditions uses EN 14511; seasonal performance calculation uses EN 14825. In the Netherlands, the ISDE subsidy scheme (Investeringssubsidie Duurzame Energie en Energiebesparing), administered by RVO, additionally requires heat pumps to appear on a positive list maintained by RVO. ISDE-eligible heat pumps must meet minimum SCOP thresholds above the Ecodesign minimum and must be tested by a recognised institution. ISDE eligibility is separate from CE marking compliance but is practically required for market acceptance in the Netherlands.
summary.zh: 生态设计法规（EU）813/2013（实施指令2009/125/EC）为空间供暖设备设定了最低季节性空间供暖能效（ηs）门槛，对热泵以SCOP（季节性性能系数）表示。额定工况测试依据EN 14511；季节性性能计算依据EN 14825。在荷兰，由RVO（荷兰企业局）管理的ISDE补贴方案（可持续能源及节能投资补贴）还要求热泵列入RVO维护的正面清单。符合ISDE资格的热泵须满足高于生态设计最低值的SCOP门槛，并须经认可机构测试。ISDE资格独立于CE标志合规，但实际上对于进入荷兰市场是必需的。
summary.zht: 生態設計法規（EU）813/2013（實施指令2009/125/EC）為空間供暖設備設定了最低季節性空間供暖能效（ηs）門檻，對熱泵以SCOP（季節性性能係數）表示。額定工況測試依據EN 14511；季節性性能計算依據EN 14825。在荷蘭，由RVO（荷蘭企業局）管理的ISDE補貼方案（可持續能源及節能投資補貼）還要求熱泵列入RVO維護的正面清單。符合ISDE資格的熱泵須滿足高於生態設計最低值的SCOP門檻，並須經認可機構測試。ISDE資格獨立於CE標誌合規，但實際上對於進入荷蘭市場是必需的。

standards_or_laws: ISDE (Investeringssubsidie Duurzame Energie en Energiebesparing) — RVO scheme

summary.en: GB 21455-2019 is the mandatory energy efficiency standard for room air conditioners and multi-split systems, specifying COP at rated conditions. For dedicated space-heating heat pumps, GB/T 25127-2010 series covers low-ambient heating performance. Neither standard employs the SCOP methodology used in EU Ecodesign. China has no ISDE-equivalent subsidy scheme with a mandatory product positive list.
summary.zh: GB 21455-2019是房间空调器和多联机的强制性能效标准，规定额定工况下的COP。针对专用空间供暖热泵，GB/T 25127-2010系列涵盖低环境温度制热性能。这两项标准均未采用欧盟生态设计所用的SCOP方法。中国没有具有强制性产品正面清单的ISDE等效补贴方案。
summary.zht: GB 21455-2019是房間空調器和多聯機的強制性能效標準，規定額定工況下的COP。針對專用空間供暖熱泵，GB/T 25127-2010系列涵蓋低環境溫度制熱性能。這兩項標準均未採用歐盟生態設計所用的SCOP方法。中國沒有具有強制性產品正面清單的ISDE等效補貼方案。

gap.en: No SCOP methodology equivalent in Chinese standards. Chinese efficiency test data cannot demonstrate compliance with EU Ecodesign ηs thresholds. Full re-testing to EN 14511 and EN 14825 is required. Additional Dutch gap: products not listed on RVO's ISDE positive list cannot qualify for the ISDE subsidy, which significantly reduces market competitiveness in the Netherlands. RVO listing requires submitting SCOP test data from a recognised testing laboratory.
gap.zh: 中国标准中没有等效的SCOP方法。中国效率测试数据不能证明符合欧盟生态设计ηs门槛。需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新进行全面测试。额外荷兰差距：未列入RVO ISDE正面清单的产品无法享受ISDE补贴，这将显著降低在荷兰市场的竞争力。RVO收录需向认可测试实验室提交SCOP测试数据。
gap.zht: 中國標準中沒有等效的SCOP方法。中國效率測試數據不能證明符合歐盟生態設計ηs門檻。需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新進行全面測試。額外荷蘭差距：未列入RVO ISDE正面清單的產品無法享受ISDE補貼，這將顯著降低在荷蘭市場的競爭力。RVO收錄需向認可測試實驗室提交SCOP測試數據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU Ecodesign — CE marking and market placement); ISDE listing not legally mandatory but practically essential for NL market competitiveness

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — no SCOP equivalent in Chinese standards; re-testing to EN 14511 and EN 14825 required. Additional Dutch gap: RVO ISDE positive-list registration required for subsidy eligibility, which is practically essential for competitiveness in the Netherlands.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 重大差距——中国标准中无等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新测试。额外荷兰差距：须在RVO ISDE正面清单登记以获得补贴资格，这对在荷兰市场具有实质性竞争力至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 重大差距——中國標準中無等效SCOP；需按EN 14511和EN 14825重新測試。額外荷蘭差距：須在RVO ISDE正面清單登記以獲得補貼資格，這對在荷蘭市場具有實質性競爭力至關重要。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Heat Pumps (Regulation (EU) No 811/2013) and Dutch Language Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——热泵（欧盟法规第811/2013号）与荷兰语要求
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——熱泵（歐盟法規第811/2013號）與荷蘭語要求

summary.en: Energy Labelling Regulation (EU) 811/2013 requires an A+++ to G energy efficiency scale for space heaters. Heat pumps must display a seasonal efficiency class on a mandatory EU energy label on the product and in the product fiche. In the Netherlands, end-user documentation including the product fiche, installation manual, and user manual must be provided in Dutch (Nederlands). This is a national requirement under the Wet op de gevaarlijke stoffen and consumer protection law, and ACM may require Dutch-language documentation during market surveillance.
summary.zh: 能效标签法规（EU）811/2013要求空间供暖设备采用A+++至G能效等级。热泵须在产品及产品信息单上粘贴强制性欧盟能效标签，显示季节性效率等级。在荷兰，包括产品信息单、安装手册和用户手册在内的终端用户文件须以荷兰语（Nederlands）提供。这是依据《危险物质法》和消费者保护法的国家要求，ACM可在市场监督期间要求提供荷兰语文件。
summary.zht: 能效標籤法規（EU）811/2013要求空間供暖設備採用A+++至G能效等級。熱泵須在產品及產品資訊單上粘貼強制性歐盟能效標籤，顯示季節性效率等級。在荷蘭，包括產品資訊單、安裝手冊和用戶手冊在內的終端用戶文件須以荷蘭語（Nederlands）提供。這是依據《危險物質法》和消費者保護法的國家要求，ACM可在市場監督期間要求提供荷蘭語文件。

standards_or_laws: Dutch consumer protection law — Dutch-language documentation required

summary.en: China's energy efficiency labelling is governed by the GB 12021 series and the MIIT/SAMR energy label scheme. The Chinese label format, efficiency tier definitions, and rating methodology differ from the EU energy label. Chinese energy labels are not recognised in the EU market. Product documentation is typically in Chinese only, requiring full translation and reformatting for the Dutch market.
summary.zh: 中国能效标签由GB 12021系列及工信部/市监总局能效标识制度管理。中国标签格式、效率等级定义及评级方法与欧盟能效标签不同。中国能效标识在欧盟市场不被认可。产品文件通常仅为中文，进入荷兰市场需进行完整翻译和重新格式化。
summary.zht: 中國能效標籤由GB 12021系列及工信部/市監總局能效標識制度管理。中國標籤格式、效率等級定義及評級方法與歐盟能效標籤不同。中國能效標識在歐盟市場不被認可。產品文件通常僅為中文，進入荷蘭市場需進行完整翻譯和重新格式化。

gap.en: A new EU energy label complying with Regulation (EU) 811/2013 is required. Seasonal efficiency must be re-calculated using EN 14825 methodology. Chinese energy label data cannot be directly transposed. Additional Dutch gap: all end-user documentation (product fiche, installation manual, user manual) must be provided in Dutch; Chinese-only or English-only documentation does not satisfy Dutch market requirements.
gap.zh: 需要符合欧盟法规811/2013的新欧盟能效标签。季节性效率须按EN 14825方法重新计算。中国能效标签数据不能直接转换使用。额外荷兰差距：所有终端用户文件（产品信息单、安装手册、用户手册）须以荷兰语提供；仅提供中文或英文文件不满足荷兰市场要求。
gap.zht: 需要符合歐盟法規811/2013的新歐盟能效標籤。季節性效率須按EN 14825方法重新計算。中國能效標籤數據不能直接轉換使用。額外荷蘭差距：所有終端用戶文件（產品資訊單、安裝手冊、用戶手冊）須以荷蘭語提供；僅提供中文或英文文件不滿足荷蘭市場要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (EU energy label required before market placement; Dutch-language documentation required by ACM/NL consumer law)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (Chinese energy label under GB 12021 series)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap — new EU energy label required; Chinese label not accepted; seasonal efficiency must be recalculated to EN 14825. Additional Dutch gap: Dutch-language end-user documentation mandatory; Chinese-only documentation does not comply.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距——需要新的欧盟能效标签；中国标签不被接受；季节性效率须按EN 14825重新计算。额外荷兰差距：强制提供荷兰语终端用户文件；仅提供中文文件不合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距——需要新的歐盟能效標籤；中國標籤不被接受；季節性效率須按EN 14825重新計算。額外荷蘭差距：強制提供荷蘭語終端用戶文件；僅提供中文文件不合規。
